notes:
Runs about as well as on Windows judging by the other people's bug reports, certain crashes occur on shader compilation errors, they're fixable by installing native d3dcompiler_43 and setting the override with winetricks (e.g. by running 
WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.steam/steam/SteamApps/compatdata/437250/pfx/ WINE="$HOME/.steam/steam/SteamApps/common/Proton 4.2/dist/bin/wine" winetricks -q d3dcompiler_43﻿﻿﻿ 
but replacing "Proton 4.2" with the actual version used).  With that workaround the game is very playable and completable.
title: A House of Many Doors

notes: Crashes during combat. Most combats can be avoided during the game, except the final boss, so I rate it borked.
title: A House of Many Doors

notes: Many users report bugs on Windows native, but I didn't encounter any in my initial 30 minutes. Did exploration, visiting cities, and combat. No issues encountered, runs perfectly out of the box so far.
title: A House of Many Doors
